summary: Feature verified: Bid logs now store and display the complete OpenRTB bid response JSON for successful bids. Backend stores bid_response field, frontend displays 'BID RESPONSE (OPENRTB)' section in blue-tinted box.

issues: Console warning: nested div inside p tag in recent activity section - minor HTML structure issue

critical_code_review_comments: bid_response field correctly added to BidLog model in models.py line 1056
openrtb_handler.py correctly stores response in log_data['bid_response'] at line 704
BidLogs.jsx correctly displays bid_response section only when selectedLog.bid_made && selectedLog.bid_response (lines 265-274)
SimpleJsonViewer component properly renders JSON with max-height scrollable container
seed_data_creation: Created test bids via /api/bid endpoint with PHL geo targeting
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bid response feature fully implemented and verified. New bids created after feature implementation will have bid_response field stored. Older bids (before feature) will not have this field - this is expected behavior. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_bid_response_feature.py can be used for regression testing.

tests_passed.test: API /api/bid-logs returns bid_response field for successful bids
bid_response contains OpenRTB structure: id, seatbid, bid array
bid array contains: id, impid, price, adid, nurl, burl, cid, crid, adm
No-bid entries do NOT have bid_response (null)
New bids correctly store bid_response in database
BID RESPONSE (OPENRTB) section visible for successful bids
JSON displayed in blue-tinted box with proper formatting
BID RESPONSE section NOT shown for no-bid entries
JSON includes seatbid, bid array, nurl, burl, price, adm fields
